name: Olivier Falahi
tagline: From leading teams to software architecture.
about: After twenty years leading teams, I chose to rebuild my craft around code. A full-stack developer on a work-study contract at CGI in Bordeaux, I'm training in software architecture: Java, Spring Boot and Quarkus on the server side, Angular and TypeScript on the interface. What drives me hasn't changed: care for detail and a taste for clear systems. This portfolio is a nod to that — it reinvents itself on every visit.

projects.title: radiant-radiation
projects.description: A minimalist terminal puzzle: flip 2×2 blocks until the grid is uniform.

projects.title: Pont Chaban
projects.description: Closure calendar for the Chaban-Delmas bridge in Bordeaux

projects.title: Library
projects.description: A library management app in Quarkus: CDI, Panache, Repository pattern and a REST client to OpenLibrary.
